name: digital-decretals
description: Searchable web edition of Bernard of Parma's Glossa Ordinaria to the Decretals of Gregory IX — text by Edward A. Reno III

scripts.data: python3 ../build/parse_gloss.py "../Decretals Gloss, Books 1-5 Complete, rev. 9.23.docx" -o public/gloss-data.json && python3 ../build/make_links.py public/gloss-data.json public/abbrev-data.json && python3 ../build/make_stats.py public/gloss-data.json public/abbrev-data.json -o data/stats.json
